description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with 'NIST_Report_Draft.docx', a technical report draft containing text from the NIST Cybersecurity Framework. Finalize the typesetting by justifying all body text (excluding the title) and enabling automatic hyphenation with a limit of exactly 2 consecutive hyphens. Apply the 'Keep lines together' setting to the definition paragraph in section 3.2 starting with 'Risk management is the ongoing process...' to prevent it from breaking across pages. Save the document as 'NIST_Report_Final.docx' in the Documents folder.

metadata.target_paragraph_start: Risk management is the ongoing process
